name: neuralmem
title: NeuralMem
description: Quick save, search, and recall your NeuralMem memories directly from Raycast.
author: Nous Research

commands.name: search
commands.title: Search Memories
commands.subtitle: NeuralMem
commands.description: Search your NeuralMem knowledge base with semantic or keyword queries.

commands.name: save
commands.title: Save to Memory
commands.subtitle: NeuralMem
commands.description: Quickly save selected text, clipboard content, or typed notes to NeuralMem.

commands.name: recent
commands.title: Recent Memories
commands.subtitle: NeuralMem
commands.description: Browse and open your most recently saved memories.

preferences.name: apiBaseUrl
preferences.title: NeuralMem API Base URL
preferences.description: Base URL of your NeuralMem API server (e.g. http://localhost:8000/api/v1).

preferences.name: apiKey
preferences.title: API Key
preferences.description: Optional API key for authenticated NeuralMem instances.

preferences.name: defaultSpace
preferences.title: Default Space
preferences.description: Default memory space / namespace to save into.
